title: Release v4.0 — 2025-12-03
text:
# Flowdesk Release v4.0 (2025-12-03)

## New
- Shipped **Granular notification controls** in Notifications. This directly addresses top customer requests.
## Fixed
- Resolved Notifications performance issues affecting Enterprise accounts.
- Fixed webhook delivery reliability.

## Impact
Early data shows Notifications support tickets down after this release.
